tasks.subject: Task 0: Workspace bootstrap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Initialize git repo, Rust workspace, seven empty crates, license files, .gitignore.

**Verify:** `cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo fmt --check`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore", "Cargo.toml", "LICENSE-MIT", "LICENSE-APACHE", "README.md", "crates/safessh-core/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-storage/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-policy/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-audit/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-ssh/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-skill/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-cli/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo fmt --check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git status shows main and develop branches", "cargo build succeeds with zero warnings", "cargo test runs zero tests with zero failures", "cargo fmt check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: CI workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GitHub Actions CI runs fmt + clippy + tests on PRs and pushes to develop/main.

**Verify:** Push and confirm GitHub Actions runs successfully.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "git push -u origin develop", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fmt-check, clippy -D warnings, cargo test --workspace all run", "build matrix: macos-14, macos-13, ubuntu-22.04", "container integration on Linux only with --features integration"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: cargo-dist release pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** cargo-dist generates the release workflow for cross-platform builds, GitHub Releases, Homebrew tap, install script.

**Verify:** `cargo dist plan` lists all four target triples.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml", ".github/workflows/release.yml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo dist plan", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 targets configured (mac arm64/x64, linux x64/arm64)", "shell + homebrew installers configured", "workflow runs only on v* tags"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: safessh-core types and Error
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Core types: Error, ProjectId, Target, ParsedCommand, PolicyDecision, ApprovalToken, AuditEvent. Exit-code mapping.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-core`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-core/src/error.rs", "crates/safessh-core/src/types.rs", "crates/safessh-core/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-core/tests/types.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-core", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Error covers every category from spec §7.1", "ProjectId rejects slashes/spaces/empty", "ApprovalToken is 6-char alphanumeric via rand", "All types serde round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Redactor with default-on patterns
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Redactor with AWS keys, JWT, private-key blocks, bearer tokens, password params. Property test: original token never appears in output.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-core --test redactor`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-core/src/redactor.rs", "crates/safessh-core/tests/redactor.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-core", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Five default patterns each tested", "Property test 256 cases", "// SAFETY-INVARIANT-6 marker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Storage paths, atomic writes, advisory locks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** XDG-style path resolution, tempfile+rename atomic writes, fs2 exclusive advisory locks.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/paths.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/atomic.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/locking.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/atomic.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Paths::user honors SAFESSH_HOME", "atomic::write_string never half-writes", "LockedFile blocks until acquired", "// SAFETY-INVARIANT-5 and -12 markers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Project + global config TOML schemas
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Project (multi-target, policy refs, output caps) and Config schemas with TOML round-trip.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage --test project`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/config.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/project.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Schema matches spec §4.4", "TOML round-trip stable", "ProjectStore CRUD against tempdir"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Approval stores (pending/timed/always/blocked)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persistent stores for the four approval states with locking, TTL expiry on read for timed.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage --test approvals`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/approvals.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/approvals.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pending add/take/cleanup_expired", "Timed list_active filters by Utc::now()", "Always/Blocked add/list/remove", "// SAFETY-INVARIANT-7 marker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Keychain integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** KeychainProvider trait + SystemKeychain (keyring crate) + MockKeychain.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage --test keyring`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/keyring.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/keyring.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage --features test-support", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Trait with get/set/delete", "SystemKeychain uses 'safessh' service name", "MockKeychain backed by HashMap"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Shell AST parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parser wraps conch-parser to produce ParsedCommand. Returns ParseError::Opaque on failure (default-deny).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-policy --test parser`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-policy/src/parser.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/src/ast.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/tests/parser.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-policy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rm -rf parses with bundled flags", "unterminated quote → Opaque", "property test: never panics"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Shell category matchers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement read:safe, destructive:filesystem, destructive:disk, privilege:escalation, system:control, network:listen, exec:opaque (excluding known SQL interpreters).

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-policy --test categories_shell`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-policy/src/categories/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/src/categories/shell.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/tests/categories_shell.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-policy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-category 3 positive + 1 negative tests", "psql -c is NOT exec:opaque", "find -delete IS destructive:filesystem"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: SQL-aware categories
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Detect db:read, db:write, destructive:db by extracting SQL from psql -c / mysql -e / sqlite3 and parsing with sqlparser.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-policy --test categories_sql`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-policy/src/categories/sql.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/tests/categories_sql.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-policy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SELECT → db:read", "DROP → destructive:db", "DELETE without WHERE → destructive:db", "DELETE WITH WHERE → db:write"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Decision engine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure decide() function: block-list first, then policy.deny, then timed/always allow rules, else default-policy or RequireApproval. Default-deny on parse failure.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-policy --test decision`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-policy/src/decision.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/tests/decision.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-policy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unparseable → RequireApproval (never Allow)", "block beats matching allow rule", "// SAFETY-INVARIANT-1 and -2 markers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: JSONL audit writer with redaction
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AuditWriter appends one JSON line per event, fsync per line, rotates at 100MB, every event passes through Redactor.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-audit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/src/event.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/src/jsonl.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/tests/jsonl.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-audit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["writes one JSON line per event", "file mode 0600", "AKIA token redacted in output", "// SAFETY-INVARIANT-4 marker on append"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: SshDriver trait + MockDriver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SshDriver trait with exec returning streamed OutputChunk + ExecResult. MockDriver for unit tests.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-ssh --test mock`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/src/driver.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/mock.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/mock.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-ssh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["trait method exec returns streamed chunks", "MockDriver::with_response registers canned responses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: OpenSSH subprocess driver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OpenSshDriver builds ssh argv from Target, spawns subprocess with ControlMaster, streams + size-caps output.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-ssh --test openssh_unit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/control_master.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/openssh_unit.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/openssh_integration.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-ssh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["argv for ssh-config alias correct", "argv for inline target includes -p/-i/-J/-J/user@host", "size caps trigger truncation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Skill content + format adapters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Embed canonical safessh.md. Implement claude-code (YAML frontmatter) and agents-md (## section) adapters.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-skill`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-skill/src/content/safessh.md", "crates/safessh-skill/src/adapters/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-skill/src/adapters/claude_code.rs", "crates/safessh-skill/src/adapters/agents_md.rs", "crates/safessh-skill/tests/adapters.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-skill", "acceptanceCriteria": ["insta snapshots committed for both adapters", "skill content covers BLOCKED token handling and output framing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 17: Skill detection + install logic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Detect installed agents, install/uninstall/show/check at correct paths, handle agents-md section append/strip.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-skill --test install`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-skill/src/detection.rs", "crates/safessh-skill/src/install.rs", "crates/safessh-skill/tests/install.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-skill", "acceptanceCriteria": ["detect() returns Detected entries", "install_to claude-code creates file", "install_to agents-md appends section without duplicates", "uninstall_at agents-md removes only safessh section"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 18: CLI skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** clap structure, main entrypoint, error→exit-code mapping, --version, --help.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test skeleton`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/errors.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/skeleton.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--version prints safessh 0.1.0", "--help lists project/policy/approve/audit/skill", "unknown subcommand exits 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 19: Project subcommands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire project add/list/edit/remove to ProjectStore.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test project_cmd`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/project.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/project_cmd.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["add writes TOML", "list prints alphabetical names", "remove fails with exit 1 if missing", "edit spawns $EDITOR"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 20: Exec end-to-end (headless)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** safessh <project> exec wires policy → audit → ssh-driver → framed output. Headless flow only.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test exec`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/output.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/exec.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BLOCKED multi-line output for RequireApproval (exit 10)", "audit log gains exec_attempt + exec_complete", "output framing intact", "all bytes pass through Redactor"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 21: TTY detection + inline approval prompt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When stdin is TTY, show 5-action dialoguer prompt. Apply action to persistent stores. Override via SAFESSH_PROMPT_RESPONSE for tests.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test prompt_unit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/prompt.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/prompt_unit.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PromptAction enum: Once/Timed(min)/Always/Deny/Block", "canned 'timed:15' parses to Timed(15)", "persistent stores updated correctly per action"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 22: approve <token> subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** safessh approve <token> [--once|--timed --minutes N|--always|--block] consumes pending request and applies action.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test approve_cmd`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/approve.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/approve_cmd.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["once removes pending", "--always adds AlwaysRule", "--timed --minutes 15 adds TimedRule", "unknown token exits 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 23: --yolo flag
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Top-level --yolo bypasses policy. Refused if disable_yolo=true. Audited as yolo_invocation. Output cap + redactor still apply.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test yolo`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/yolo.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["yolo skips policy", "disable_yolo=true returns exit 13", "yolo audited and redacted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 24: Remaining subcommands (policy show, audit query, skill)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire policy show <category|project>, audit query (grep over JSONL), skill install/uninstall/show/check.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test misc_cmds`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/policy.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/audit.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/skill.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/misc_cmds.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["policy show lists category binaries", "audit query filters by project/type/grep", "skill install --target claude-code --scope user writes file", "skill check reports per-target status"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 25: End-to-end integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real SSH server in Docker, full happy-path + approval round-trip + ControlMaster reuse, gated by --features integration.

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --features integration --test e2e_integration`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/tests/e2e_integration.rs", "tests/fixtures/gen-keys.sh"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --features integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path echo hello succeeds with exit 0 and framing", "approval round-trip: blocked → approve → succeeds", "second invocation faster than first (ControlMaster)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 26: User-facing documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README + docs/getting-started + cli-reference + skill + security + development.

**Verify:** Manual review — no TBDs/TODOs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "docs/getting-started.md", "docs/cli-reference.md", "docs/skill.md", "docs/security.md", "docs/development.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README has tagline + 3 install paths + quick start + features table", "each doc under 300 lines", "no placeholders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 27: v0.1.0 release rehearsal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify cargo-dist pipeline end-to-end via v0.1.0-rc.1 tag, then promote to v0.1.0.

**Verify:** Manual rehearsal on clean macOS arm64 + Linux x64 machines.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md", "Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CHANGELOG v0.1.0 entry complete", "GitHub Release with 4 binaries + checksums", "Homebrew formula updated in tap repo", "installer.sh hosted and works on clean Linux", "brew install works on clean macOS"]}
```
